messages.content: You are a participant in an online survey. Read the scenario and respond as an ordinary American adult. IMPORTANT: Give only the exact response format requested — a single word, a single number, or YES/NO. No explanations, no caveats, no extra text.

US respondents recruited on Prolific completed a paired-profile conjoint experiment about a city-government community activity worker position. Each choice compared two randomized job profiles that varied in pay, bonuses, evaluation methods, target-community characteristics, overtime, and key tasks. The paper estimates how each attribute level changes the probability that a profile is chosen.Job changes from never requiring extra evening work to frequently requiring overtime.

Which of the two job profiles does the respondent personally prefer?

Reply with exactly one of: job A or job B.
